zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Insula de Lisle於1104年出生在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾時，他的父親Robert de Insula de Lisle III31歲，母親Albreda de Tosny36歲。他於1126年之前與Ragnhilde Sumarlidasson Rognvaldsdottir在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1160年12月25日在英國英格蘭多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Insula de Lisle于1104年出生在英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾时，他的父亲Robert de Insula de Lisle III31岁，母亲Albreda de Tosny36岁。他于1126年之前与Ragnhilde Sumarlidasson Rognvaldsdottir在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1160年12月25日在英国英格兰多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Insula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of the places called Insua, meaning ‘island, peninsula (of a river or of the sea), land by a river’, from Latin insula ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lisle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Insula de Lisle was born in 1104, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, his father, Robert de Insula de Lisle III, was 31 and his mother, Albreda de Tosny, was 36. He married Ragnhilde Sumarlidasson Rognvaldsdottir before 1126, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 December 1160, in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Insula de Lisle est né en 1104, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Insula de Lisle III, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Albreda de Tosny, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Ragnhilde Sumarlidasson Rognvaldsdottir avant 1126, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1160, à Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England: Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John de Insula de Lisle 1104 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Insula de Lisle III 31 und seine Mutter Albreda de Tosny 36. Er hat vor 1126 in England Ragnhilde Sumarlidasson Rognvaldsdottir geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Dezember 1160 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Ragnhilde Sumarlidasson Rognvaldsdottir prima del 1126, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 dicembre 1160, nel Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Insula de Lisleが1104年にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルで生まれた時，父Robert de Insula de Lisle IIIは31歳，母Albreda de Tosnyは36歳であった。1126年以前にイギリスでRagnhilde Sumarlidasson Rognvaldsdottirと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1160年12月25日にイギリスイギリスドールセトメルコンベ レジスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Insula de Lisle(이)가 1104년 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Insula de Lisle III(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda de Tosny(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1126년 이전 영국에서 Ragnhilde Sumarlidasson Rognvaldsdottir(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1160년 12월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 멜코브 레지스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Insula de Lisle nasceu em 1104, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Insula de Lisle III, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Albreda de Tosny, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Ragnhilde Sumarlidasson Rognvaldsdottir antes 1126, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1160, em Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Insula de Lisle родился в 1104 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Insula de Lisle III было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Albreda de Tosny, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Ragnhilde Sumarlidasson Rognvaldsdottir перед 1126 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 декабря 1160 г. в местности мелкомб регис, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

Se casó con Ragnhilde Sumarlidasson Rognvaldsdottir antes de 1126, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas.
